description: สร้าง Dashboard จริงแบบ Next.js + API สำหรับโครงการตรวจสอบฐานข้อมูลโรงพยาบาล

phases.name: Task Planning
phases.description: วิเคราะห์ข้อมูล inspection และวางแผน Dashboard features, pages, API endpoints

phases.name: System Architecture
phases.description: ออกแบบโครงสร้างโปรเจกต์ Next.js, folder structure, API design, database connection strategy

phases.name: Dashboard Architecture
phases.description: ออกแบบ UI components, charts, widgets, responsive layout, navigation

phases.name: SQL Query Design
phases.description: สร้าง optimized SQL queries สำหรับ Dashboard API endpoints

phases.name: Data Engineering
phases.description: Data transformation logic, API response formatting, aggregation strategies

phases.name: Backend Implementation
phases.description: Implement Next.js API routes, database connection, error handling

phases.name: Frontend Implementation
phases.description: Implement Dashboard UI, charts, tables, real-time updates

phases.name: Documentation
phases.description: API documentation, setup guide, deployment instructions

phases.name: QA Review
phases.description: Testing, performance review, security check, code quality

phases.name: Release Manager
phases.description: Final deployment checklist, release notes, production readiness

handoff_messages.02-task-planner: วิเคราะห์ข้อมูล inspection จาก outputs/*.json และ state/dashboard_schema.json กำหนด Dashboard features ที่ควรมี เช่น Database Overview, Module Summary, Anomaly Alerts, Index Recommendations, Real-time Stats
handoff_messages.17-system-architect: จาก dashboard_plan.json ออกแบบ Next.js App Router structure, API routes (/api/db-stats, /api/modules, /api/anomalies, /api/index-gaps), database connection (MariaDB MySQL), environment setup
handoff_messages.13-dashboard-architect: ออกแบบ Dashboard layout: sidebar navigation, main content area, responsive grid. Components: DatabaseStatsCard, ModuleChart, AnomalyTable, IndexGapList, TrendChart
handoff_messages.04-sql-dba: สร้าง SQL queries สำหรับ: database overview stats, module row counts, anomaly detection, index gap analysis. Optimize ด้วย indexes ที่แนะนำจาก inspection
handoff_messages.05-data-engineer: Transform raw SQL results เป็น API response format, aggregate module data, calculate percentages, format anomalies
handoff_messages.06-backend-engineer: Implement Next.js API routes, use mysql2/promise for connection pooling, error handling, rate limiting. Store queries in src/lib/queries.ts
handoff_messages.07-frontend-engineer: Build Dashboard pages: / (overview), /modules, /anomalies, /indexes. Use Chart.js or Recharts for visualizations, Tailwind CSS for styling
handoff_messages.11-doc-writer: Document API endpoints, setup instructions, environment variables, database connection string format
handoff_messages.10-qa-reviewer: Test API responses, check SQL injection prevention, verify responsive design, performance test with large datasets
handoff_messages.20-release-manager: Create deployment guide for production (pm2, nginx, SSL), environment checklist, rollback procedure
